summary: install_config.json had FAIL_TO_PASS=[] which forces the SWE-rebench parser into the 'overall pass rate' fallback. Canonical patch contains 5 new/updated unit tests inside the macros crate (light_pdas::light_account_keywords::tests::test_boolean_flag_keys, test_associated_token_namespace_keys; light_pdas::accounts::light_account::tests::test_parse_associated_token_idempotent_{absent_is_false,flag_is_true,with_value_fails}). These run inside cargo test -p light-sdk-macros and are the canonical behavioural anchors. Populated F2P with the 5 tests; switched to --lib to skip slow integration-test compile. Integration tests in d10_ata_idempotent_test.rs need solana-test-validator + clang-linked builds and were intentionally excluded (same call as sibling task-a3ba62).
fixes_applied: install_config.json: populated FAIL_TO_PASS with 5 macro-crate unit tests from canonical patch
install_config.json: changed test_cmd to 'cargo test -p light-sdk-macros --lib' (skip integration tests requiring clang)
p2p_regression_note: SWE-rebench-style harness uses overall PASS_TO_PASS list instead of P2P_REGRESSION mechanism; PASS_TO_PASS left empty (no obvious upstream regression set in this surface).
f2p_quality: BEHAVIORAL — the 5 unit tests are part of the canonical patch and exercise parser-level boolean-flag semantics described verbatim in instruction.md TODOs 1, 2, 3. Pure behavioral signal, not structural.
